ddls:
CREATE TABLE "handicappers" (
  "handicapper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handicapper */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the handicapper */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the handicapper */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the handicapper's account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the handicapper's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the handicapper */,
  "social_media_link" TEXT /* URL to the handicapper's social media profile */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the handicapper */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the handicapper */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account is verified */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the handicapper's account */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences for the handicapper */,
  "favorite_sports" TEXT /* Favorite sports of the handicapper */,
  "favorite_leagues" TEXT /* Favorite leagues of the handicapper */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "account_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last account update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handicapper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pick */,
  "handicapper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the handicapper who made the pick */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport of the pick (e.g., NFL, NBA, MLB) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the pick (e.g., NFL, NCAA) */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., moneyline, point spread, over/under) */,
  "pick" TEXT /* The actual pick made by the handicapper */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the pick */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the pick (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  "event" TEXT /* Specific event or game associated with the pick */,
  "stake_amount" REAL /* Amount staked on the pick */,
  "potential_payout" REAL /* Potential payout if the pick wins */,
  "actual_payout" REAL /* Actual payout if the pick wins */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments added by the handicapper */,
  "pick_date" TEXT /* Date of the pick */,
  "pick_time" TEXT /* Time of the pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_handicapper_id FOREIGN KEY ("handicapper_id") REFERENCES handicappers ("handicapper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "handicapper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the handicapper */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the handicapper */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the handicapper */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the handicapper */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Percentage of wins */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Percentage of losses */,
  "push_rate" REAL /* Percentage of pushes */,
  "average_odds" REAL /* Average odds of the picks */,
  "average_stake" REAL /* Average stake amount */,
  "total_stakes" REAL /* Total stakes made by the handicapper */,
  "daily_roi" REAL /* ROI for the day */,
  "weekly_roi" REAL /* ROI for the week */,
  "monthly_roi" REAL /* ROI for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_handicapper_id FOREIGN KEY ("handicapper_id") REFERENCES handicappers ("handicapper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "handicapper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the handicapper */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the handicapper */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the ranking (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the handicapper */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_handicapper_id FOREIGN KEY ("handicapper_id") REFERENCES handicappers ("handicapper_id")
)
